purpose_zh: 定義首頁 active 工程資料可納入與必須排除的狀態，避免為了補足 300 件而混入過期、重複或無法查證資料。
purpose_en: Define which project statuses can enter the active homepage map and which must stay outside, so the 300-record gate does not accept outdated, duplicate, or unverified records.

allowed_statuses.active_rule: Allowed when an official or traceable source shows the project is still being advanced.
Alias of 計畫中; allowed only when the source shows the project is still current.
Allowed for feasibility, evaluation, review, or route/solution assessment with a current traceable source.
Allowed for design, detailed design, engineering design, or design-and-build preparation with a current traceable source.
Allowed when construction, installation, civil works, system works, or site works are still active.

allowed_statuses.status_en: Completed or opened within one month
allowed_statuses.active_rule: Allowed only when completed_at or opened_at is traceable and within 31 days of the current review date.

excluded_statuses.reason: Keep out of active unless another official source proves the project belongs to planned, under-evaluation, or in-design status.
Keep out of active unless it can be mapped to planned, under-evaluation, or in-design with a traceable source.
Too broad for the active gate unless normalized to 計畫中, 評估中, or 設計中 with evidence.
Not accepted as an active-status label by itself; move to candidate review until a current delivery phase is confirmed.
Candidate-only. It cannot count toward active totals until status, source, and dedupe checks pass.

excluded_statuses.status_en: Completed more than one month ago
excluded_statuses.reason: Historical or archive data only; do not count in active homepage statistics.

excluded_statuses.status_zh: 取消／停辦／停止推動／來源失效
excluded_statuses.status_en: Canceled, suspended, stopped, or inactive source
excluded_statuses.reason: Excluded from active and preserved only in historical, exclusion, or audit records when useful.

homepage_performance_rule.rule_zh: 首頁需先顯示搜尋、篩選、統計、地圖容器、工程清單或降級清單與來源提示；資料量超過首屏需求時需分頁、分批、分類或延後載入。
homepage_performance_rule.rule_en: The homepage must show search, filters, stats, map frame, project list or fallback list, and source notes first; large datasets need paging, batching, sector lanes, or deferred loading.

notes: This file is a public-readable rule reference, not a candidate import list.
Candidate records that do not pass this policy must not be mixed into data/active_construction_projects.geojson.
